scope: Migration of the read-only legacy connector: object metadata (Describe Global) plus allow-listed Account/Contact/Lead SOQL queries. The full Salesforce object graph, Bulk API, and Streaming API are out of scope; a REST-based read-only migration mirrors legacy exactly.

excluded.reason: /services/data/{version}/query (arbitrary SOQL) is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it

/services/data/{version}/sobjects/{sObject}/describe is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/services/data/{version}/sobjects/{sObject} is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/services/data/{version}/sobjects/{sObject}/{id} is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/services/data/{version}/sobjects/{sObject}/{id} is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/services/data/{version}/jobs/query (Bulk API) is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
